policy_decision: Temporary units are row-order monotonic T_K legs; assign trace_leg_id_candidate 1..L per file_id along row_index.
implementation_requirement: Partition legs when sign(diff(T_K)) changes after epsilon_T_K jitter suppression for boundary detection.
claim_boundary: Does not define physical protocol names or phases.

policy_decision: Legs follow row_index / time order; global T_K sort must not define legs or derivative adjacency.
implementation_requirement: Sort by row_index within file_id only for leg detection and differencing paths.
claim_boundary: No statement that legs match vendor segments or thermal programs.

policy_decision: Default epsilon_T_K = 1e-6 K for slope-sign and leg-boundary detection.
implementation_requirement: Document epsilon in run summary; optional override from instrument resolution tables only with manifest note.

policy_decision: No finite-difference stencil may span two trace_leg_id_candidate values.
implementation_requirement: Assert in code paths and validation tables; gate failure if violated.
claim_boundary: Prevents stitched derivatives across legs only.

policy_decision: Each leg must have N_min >= 5 usable points after gates.
implementation_requirement: Emit BLOCKED row + gate failure entry when N_min fails.
claim_boundary: Blocked leg is engineering status not sample judgment.

policy_decision: T_K strictly monotonic along row_index inside leg after jitter policy.
implementation_requirement: Reject or block legs with interior reversals.

policy_decision: No interpolation regridding or smoothing on M or T for trace-leg candidates.
implementation_requirement: Hard-disable same as Stage 8.2 trace-safe branch.
claim_boundary: No alteration of measured sample semantics beyond finite differences.

policy_decision: Central interior one-sided edges along leg row order per Stage 8.2 math family.
implementation_requirement: Mirror Stage 8.2 finite-difference kernel scoped to leg rows only.
claim_boundary: Method choice is numerical not mechanistic.

policy_decision: Primary published peaks remain abs-based trace_leg_candidate names.
implementation_requirement: Expose sign-aware dM/dT only if needed as secondary diagnostic with distinct naming.
claim_boundary: Peak location is not Tc or transition temperature.

policy_decision: Global NO production and NO advanced until implementation + validation complete.
implementation_requirement: Do not flip readiness flags in planning artifacts.
claim_boundary: Planning documents carry no release authority.
